hooks.command: bash -c 'kb_total=$(cat ~/.claude/knowledge/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | wc -l); handoff=$(ls -t ~/.claude/handoffs/*/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -1); msg=""; if [ "$kb_total" -gt 0 ]; then msg="[Genesis] Knowledge base: $kb_total entries. Use /genesis-prime to load relevant context."; fi; if [ -n "$handoff" ]; then msg="$msg [Genesis] Last handoff: $handoff — use /genesis-handoff resume to continue."; fi; if [ -n "$msg" ]; then printf "{\"additionalContext\": \"%s\"}" "$msg"; fi'

bash -c 'kb_dir="$HOME/.claude/knowledge"; if [ -d "$kb_dir" ]; then total=$(cat "$kb_dir"/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"[Genesis] Session ending. $total knowledge entries stored. Consider /genesis-self-reflect to capture learnings and /genesis-handoff create to save state.\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'handoff_dir="$HOME/.claude/handoffs/default"; mkdir -p "$handoff_dir"; ts=$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M); echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"[Genesis] Context compacting. Save your work state with /genesis-handoff create before context is lost.\"}"

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); if [ -d "$cwd/.git" ]; then branch=$(cd "$cwd" && git -c core.fileMode=false symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] && git_info="($branch)" || git_info=""; else git_info=""; fi; dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); status=""; [ -n "$git_info" ] && status="$git_info"; [ -n "$status" ] && status="$status $dir_name" || status="$dir_name"; status="$status | $model"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && status="$status | Context: ${remaining}% remaining"; echo "$status"
